demographics.instructions: Please answer a few background questions before we begin.

questions.text: What is your age range?
What is your primary area of study or work?
How often do you read academic papers?
Have you used highlighting tools when reading papers before?

paper1.title: Paper 1 Title (replace me)
paper1.taskInstructions: Use the paper to find the correct answers to the questions on the right. You may submit as many times as needed — your time and number of attempts are recorded. All multiple-choice questions must be answered correctly before you can proceed.

questions.text: REPLACE: Question 1 for paper 1?
REPLACE: Question 2 for paper 1?
REPLACE: Open-ended question for paper 1 (optional, does not block completion).

questionnaire.instructions: Please rate your experience reading this paper.

questions.text: I found it difficult to answer Question 1.
I found it difficult to answer Question 2.
Overall, how easy was it to skim this paper for the relevant information?
Any comments about reading this paper?

finalQuestionnaire.instructions: Please answer these final questions about your overall experience with the study.

questions.text: Overall, how useful did you find the text highlighting when it was present?
Did the highlighting ever distract you or draw your attention to unhelpful areas?
Which reading condition did you prefer?

options.C: Contextual highlights (based on what you've read)

questions.text: Please share any additional comments, observations, or suggestions.
